name: toolbelt
description: Connect Claude to your governed Toolbelt org, pick the optimal model per task, and route work to its agents. Bundles the router behavior so there's nothing to paste.

toolbelt_org_name.title: Org name
toolbelt_org_name.description: A friendly name for this Toolbelt org (e.g. your company). Claude uses it to refer to your org and helps you tell multiple Toolbelt connections apart.

toolbelt_workspace_id.title: Hub workspace (assistant) ID
toolbelt_workspace_id.description: Your Toolbelt hub workspace (assistant) ID — the agent whose endpoint lists your org roster and routes work.

toolbelt_api_key.title: Toolbelt API key
toolbelt_api_key.description: Your Toolbelt API key. Stored in your OS keychain (sensitive); sent as an Authorization: Bearer header, never in a URL.
